name: Box Layout Intent
summary: A primitive layout region-role (#1680 taxonomy): composition-intent = a padded container with an optional max-measure. Identity is the arrangement, not the CSS — FUI ships one block per role and the mechanism (padding + optional max-inline-size + auto margin) is an impl seam. Project-less; per-project styling rides presentational variants + plateau assembler presets.

padding.description: The inset applied on all sides, on a spacing scale — the role's essential knob.

measure.description: An optional maximum inline-size constraint on the content. Absent → unconstrained (the most-permissive default).

invert.description: Whether the box flips to an inverted tone/contrast context (a dark-on-light → light-on-dark surface). Default false.

description:
What This Is

A padded container that establishes a fresh spacing context and optionally constrains its content to a comfortable measure — a card surface, a callout, a section wrapper.

Composition-intent (the identity)

A primitive layout region-role (layoutTier: region-role), one of the per-role taxonomy ratified in #1680. Its identity is the composition-intent — a padded container with an optional max-measure — impl-agnostic. FUI ships exactly one block for this role; the CSS mechanism (padding + optional max-inline-size + auto margin) is an impl seam, never the role's identity (platform-decisions.md#layout-role-composition-intent).

Dimensions (UX-only)

  • padding: The inset applied on all sides, on a spacing scale — the role's essential knob (none · xs · sm · md · lg · xl).
  • measure: An optional maximum inline-size constraint on the content. Absent → unconstrained (the most-permissive default).
  • invert: Whether the box flips to an inverted tone/contrast context (a dark-on-light → light-on-dark surface). Default false (true · false).

Annotation, not identity

An optional region landmark applies only when the box is a named, navigable section — a content annotation, never the role itself.
